description:
A powerful, intuitive, ultra-customizable and dead set on mailing

Mailbird is an innovative email client that revitalizes your emailing experience with a modern design and streamlined navigation. It integrates all your communication, collaboration, and productivity apps into one workspace, allowing you to manage your inbox efficiently. With features like sender blocking and inbox categories, it helps you focus on important messages and reduce clutter. Additionally, Mailbird offers a unique email template tool and leverages artificial intelligence to create natural-sounding emails quickly, enhancing your productivity and email management.
New Features
- Added Leave Me Alone app.

Enhancements
- Improved styling and performance.
- Undo send period set to 5 seconds by default for new users.
- Cleaned up the composing tab of the settings by combining the email tracking group with sending.
- Moved settings for sending up higher in the composing tab of the settings.

Fixed Bugs
- Fixed issue where forwarding an email didn't include the email to be forwarded if it was malformed.
- Fixed issue with inline reply triggering for normal indented text.
- Fixed unreadable emails due to the mail viewer using the PC's dark mode.BugFix=Fixed broken astronaut background image.
- Fixed issue with Google Calendar sidebar event delete button not working.
- Personal Outlook.com accounts with custom domains will now correctly default to IMAP/SMTP.
